ddls:
CREATE TABLE "studio_tests" (
  "studio_test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each studio test */,
  "studio_test_name" TEXT /* Name of the studio test */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the studio test */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the test was conducted */,
  "expected_duration" INTEGER /* Expected duration of the test in minutes */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of test (e.g., practice, assessment) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("studio_test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recording session */,
  "studio_test_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the studio test conducted */,
  "record_name" TEXT /* Name of the recording session */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant involved */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the recording session */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the recording session */,
  "recording_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the recording (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "recording_format" TEXT /* Format of the recording (e.g., MP3, WAV) */,
  "recording_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the recording session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_records_studio_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("studio_test_id") REFERENCES studio_tests ("studio_test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_records_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "participant_name" TEXT /* Name of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "instrument" TEXT /* Instrument played by the participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "experience_level" TEXT /* Experience level of the participant (e.g., beginner, intermediate, advanced) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media" (
  "media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media file */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the recording session */,
  "media_name" TEXT /* Name of the media file */,
  "media_type" TEXT /* Type of the media file (e.g., image, audio) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the media file */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the media file was uploaded */,
  "media_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the media file (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "media_format" TEXT /* Format of the media file (e.g., PNG, MP3) */,
  "media_size" INTEGER /* Size of the media file in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES records ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "category_type" TEXT /* Type of category (e.g., performance, technical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "index_data" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indexed data entry */,
  "media_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the media file */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category used for indexing */,
  "index_value" REAL /* Value of the indexed data */,
  "index_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the indexed data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_index_data_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_index_data_media_id FOREIGN KEY ("media_id") REFERENCES media ("media_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant */,
  "studio_test_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the studio test */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric (e.g., percentage, seconds) */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_studio_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("studio_test_id") REFERENCES studio_tests ("studio_test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant */,
  "studio_test_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the studio test */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback provided */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was provided */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., positive, negative) */,
  "feedback_source" TEXT /* Source of the feedback (e.g., educator, peer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_studio_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("studio_test_id") REFERENCES studio_tests ("studio_test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "educators" (
  "educator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each educator */,
  "educator_name" TEXT /* Name of the educator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the educator */,
  "instrument" TEXT /* Instrument specialty of the educator */,
  "experience_level" TEXT /* Experience level of the educator (e.g., junior, senior) */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the educator (e.g., classical, jazz) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("educator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "practice_sessions" (
  "practice_session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each practice session */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant */,
  "studio_test_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the studio test */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the practice session */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the practice session */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the practice session in minutes */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of practice session (e.g., individual, group) */,
  "session_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the practice session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("practice_session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_practice_sessions_studio_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("studio_test_id") REFERENCES studio_tests ("studio_test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_practice_sessions_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "progress_tracking" (
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progress tracking entry */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant */,
  "studio_test_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the studio test */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric being tracked */,
  "start_value" REAL /* Start value of the metric */,
  "end_value" REAL /* End value of the metric */,
  "progress_date" TEXT /* Date the progress was tracked */,
  "progress_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the progress tracking */,
  "target_value" REAL /* Target value for the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_progress_tracking_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_progress_tracking_studio_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("studio_test_id") REFERENCES studio_tests ("studio_test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaboration" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration entry */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant */,
  "educator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the educator */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the collaboration */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the collaboration */,
  "collaboration_type" TEXT /* Type of collaboration (e.g., one-on-one lessons, group workshops) */,
  "collaboration_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the collaboration */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the collaboration (e.g., weekly, bi-weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaboration_educator_id FOREIGN KEY ("educator_id") REFERENCES educators ("educator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaboration_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant */,
  "educator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the educator */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., performance analysis, progress report) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., completed, in progress) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_educator_id FOREIGN KEY ("educator_id") REFERENCES educators ("educator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric being analyzed */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "data_date" TEXT /* Date the data was recorded */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric (e.g., percentage, seconds) */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id")
)
